title: lamium purpureum subsp. hybridum
intro: Lamium purpureum subsp. hybridum, commonly known as purple dead-nettle, is a perennial plant native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The plant's medicinal properties make it beneficial for relieving headaches, fever, and digestive issues, while also helping to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of Lamium purpureum subsp. hybridum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
